Anatta Nergui
Home Browse Graph Lexicon Cloud Index Length About
← Collection

Umbilical Cord

What happened
When the cord was cut —

Separation

One became two
But — not two

One became
One
And One

The first one — alone
The second one — alone

A gazillion —
Alone

What got separated, then —

From whom

Atmosphere
sparsevertiginous
Crux
indivisibility
Words
38
Domain
separationorigin
Ground
nondualontological
